title: SourceDriftFindingPayload
description: Payload for source_drift_finding family v1. Describes a detected drift between declared and observed truth for a system.

system_id.description: Identifier of the system where drift was observed.

declared_truth_ref.description: Reference to the declared or expected truth (canonical ref or URI).

observed_truth_ref.description: Reference to the observed actual state (canonical ref or URI).

impact_scope.description: Scope of impact for this drift finding.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the drift detection.

operator_summary.description: Plain-language summary for the operator review surface.

evidence_refs.description: Optional references to supporting evidence artifacts.

affected_components.description: Optional list of affected component identifiers.

detection_source.description: Optional identifier of the detection mechanism or check that produced this finding.
